created_for: Road Safety Hackathon 2026 – RoadWatch Track, CoERS IIT Madras
description: All data in this bundle is sourced from official Indian government publications and open data portals. Every figure is verifiable and citable by judges.

files.description: National road accident statistics for 2023 – total accidents, fatalities, injuries by road type, state, city, time of day and cause.
files.use_in_app: Accident heatmaps, safe route scoring, NH risk indicators

files.description: Road-code level accident, fatality and injury counts for major NHs and SHs in 2023.
files.use_in_app: Per-road risk badge in Tender Registry, accident overlay on satellite map

files.description: NHAI capital expenditure 2019-24, MoRTH budget allocations 2021-26, PMGSY state-wise physical and financial progress, Bharatmala Phase 1 CAG audit findings.
files.use_in_app: Audit Ledger sanctioned vs spent chart, budget transparency source citations

files.description: NH and SH road records with road type, length, last relaying year, responsible authority, executive engineer name and contact, sanctioned vs spent budget, and accident counts.
files.use_in_app: Tender Registry table rows – replace all hardcoded dummy data with these

files.description: Top 8 real NH contractors with project counts, km under construction, cost overrun averages, quality ratings, and CAG audit flagged findings.
files.use_in_app: Contractor Performance Registry, overrun alerts, rating stars

citation_template.note: Use this template to add source badges in your app UI
citation_template.example: Source: MoRTH Road Accidents in India 2023, Table 2.1 | Open Government License

live_apis_to_complement.name: Overpass API (OpenStreetMap) – Road type by GPS
live_apis_to_complement.usage: GET real road classification (NH/SH/MDR) for any lat/lon in India

live_apis_to_complement.name: PMGSY OMMS – Rural road live data
live_apis_to_complement.usage: District-level rural road contractor and spending data

live_apis_to_complement.name: NHAI eTender – Live tender search
live_apis_to_complement.usage: Search current open tenders by state/NH number
